title: Avatar Component
content:
The Avatar component provides a customizable way to display user profiles or other images. It is built upon the `@radix-ui/react-avatar` library, offering a flexible and accessible solution for avatar implementations. ## Exports - **`Avatar`**: The root component for an avatar. It wraps the `AvatarImage` and `AvatarFallback`. - Props: Accepts standard `AvatarPrimitive.Root` props, including `className` for custom styling. - **`AvatarImage`**: The component to display the actual image of the avatar. - Props: Accepts standard `AvatarPrimitive.Image` props, including `src`, `alt`, and `className`. - **`AvatarFallback`**: A fallback component displayed when the `AvatarImage` fails to load or is not yet available. It typically displays initials or a placeholder icon. - Props: Accepts standard `AvatarPrimitive.Fallback` props, including `className`. ## Usage ```tsx import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback } from '@/components/ui/avatar'; function UserProfile() { return (
CN

shadcn

shadcn@example.com

); } export default UserProfile; ``` This example demonstrates how to use the `Avatar` component with an image source and a fallback text. The `AvatarFallback` will be displayed if the image at `https://github.com/shadcn.png` cannot be loaded.
